content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from ICM-equipped autonomous agents can be repurposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data samples get stored and consolidated into 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, cutting redundant memory usage by up to 40% while improving downstream task generalization. This replaces the standard active learning uncertainty scoring heuristic with a curiosity-aligned selection that matches how the agent’s own memory system prioritizes information.
